name: Party Appetizer
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cream cheese and milk in a bowl.
2. Add the sliced dried beef (cut into small pieces), green peppers, onions, garlic salt, and pepper to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Stir in the sour cream.
4. Spread the mixture into a baking dish.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
6. Place pecans on top.
7. Serve warm with crackers for dipping.
